nodes.title: JLC-Padded-Image : Sample Workflow using Crop & Stitch
widgets_values:
Sample workflow for Inpainting/Outpainting using JLC-Padded-Image to generate both the main mask and the auxiliary mask. Using ComfyUI-Inpaint-CropAndStitch (https://github.com/lquesada/ComfyUI-Inpaint-CropAndStitch). Note the padding mask slightly expanding the image and the inpainting masks adding cute details.

Inpainting masks for thin or small details are very senstitve to the choice of "feathering" and "seamFix" parameters in JLC-Padded-Image and to max_blend_pixels and output_padding in Image-Crop. If they are too small for the picture resolution and detail demansions, the inpainting masks will be ignored or will have minimal effect. The settings are largely empirical and your mileage might vary, so experimentation is necessary.
